description_long: This is a luxurious wristwatch featuring a round, gold-toned metal case with a deep green dial. The dial is adorned with gold hour markers, three subdials, and gold hands, giving it a chronograph appearance. The watch has a black, textured leather strap with a visible grain pattern and a classic buckle closure. The crown and pushers on the right side of the case are also gold, matching the case and adding to the premium aesthetic. The brand logo and name are prominently displayed below the 12 o'clock position on the dial. The overall design is elegant and sophisticated, suitable for formal or upscale urban settings.
description: A gold-cased chronograph wristwatch with a green dial, gold markers, and a black textured leather strap. The design is elegant and luxurious, featuring a prominent brand logo and multiple subdials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green dial, gold markers, three subdials, and the brand logo below 12 o'clock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold case thickness, crown, and pushers, as well as the black leather strap's texture.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the black leather strap, its buckle, and the back of the gold case.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth gold case and the inner side of the leather strap.
attribute_brand_logo: Gold text logo 'ASKOLDA' and a small emblem, both located below the 12 o'clock position on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: Chronograph style with a green background, gold indices, three subdials, gold hands, and a gold brand logo. The dial is detailed and elegant, with a classic arrangement and no numerals.
attribute_strap_type: Black textured leather strap with a visible grain pattern and stitched edges.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three gold hands and three subdials, no digital elements, and no visible date window.
